prompt: Create a high-end 3D photorealistic editorial render of a giant smartphone lying diagonally on a dark matte textured surface, viewed from an elevated three-quarter angle. The phone displays a Spotify-style music player interface with black UI, rounded album artwork, white controls, and green accent icons. The visible track is Last Last by Burna Boy, with the playlist/title text African Giant near the top. The album art shows a portrait against a bright blue sky with clouds and red handwritten-style lettering. Standing physically on top of the phone screen is a full-body photorealistic male music artist, scaled like a miniature giant relative to the device, wearing an all-black short-sleeve button-up shirt, black pants, black sneakers, layered diamond chains, bracelet, watch, and visible arm tattoos; his hands are in his pockets and his face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur. Use dramatic studio lighting, glossy reflections on the phone glass, crisp shadows under the shoes, realistic depth of field, premium commercial photography look, dark charcoal background, ultra-detailed materials, 1:1 square composition.
